overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket crossing a busy futuristic intersection in Night City. The scene features neon-lit modern architecture, passing vehicles, and overcast daylight conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with neon accents

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives through the intersection from left to right
ego character steps off the curb and begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the pedestrian crosswalk toward the center of the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: pink neon street sign reading 'Grant Ave' mounted on the traffic structure
tall traffic pole with prominent pink neon vertical accents
tall cylindrical residential tower with glass facade and visible balconies
palm trees lining the left side of the street
large digital advertisement screen mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection in Night City, with the ego character beginning to cross the street. A black sedan passes by on the left while the 'Grant Ave' sign and a tall glass tower dominate the background. The scene is set under overcast skies with neon pink accents on the traffic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: middle of intersection near traffic signal pole

events.description: camera passes close to the traffic signal pole, temporarily blocking the view of the far side
futuristic purple off-road jeep passes through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection past the central traffic signal pole

notable_agents.action: purple off-road jeep driving through the intersection

entered.detail: glass-enclosed pedestrian skybridge connecting two buildings across the street
concrete multi-story parking garage structure with open levels

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the middle of the intersection, passing the prominent pink traffic signal pole. A purple off-road vehicle crosses the scene from right to left. The pedestrian skybridge becomes visible in the background, and a multi-story parking structure appears on the right side as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching sidewalk with parking structure and digital signage

events.description: approaching the far sidewalk, transitioning from crosswalk to street edge
camera turns slightly right toward the parking structure sidewalk

agents.ego_description: reaching the far side of the intersection and stepping onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair walking past the camera on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character completing the street crossing and approaching the sidewalk. The camera turns slightly right, bringing the multi-story parking structure into close view on the right. A pedestrian with pink hair passes by in the foreground, while the glass tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera reorients toward the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a bustling futuristic intersection that shifts from a wide urban vista to a close-up approach of a city sidewalk. It begins as the character enters the street under overcast skies, passing a black sedan while a tall glass tower and the Grant Ave sign loom in the background. As the camera advances through the intersection, it glides past a neon pink traffic pole and a purple off-road vehicle, bringing a pedestrian skybridge and a massive parking structure into view. The scene then shifts as the character completes the crossing, with the camera turning slightly right to bring the parking structure into close proximity. Finally, the perspective reorients toward the sidewalk as a pink-haired pedestrian passes by and the glass tower recedes to the left of the frame.
